title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
summary: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.

title: Swift Readies Ledger for 24/7 Token Transfers—Though True Settlement Is Stuck on Old Rails
summary: Swift’s pilot allows 17 global banks to transfer tokenized deposits on weekends, but ultimate settlement still relies on legacy systems.

title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
summary: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
summary: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000.

title: EU Set to Revise MiCA in 2027 to Cover Foreign Stablecoin Issuers
summary: Trump's embrace of stablecoins is pushing Brussels to expand its crypto law to non-EU issuers and tokenized payments, EU diplomats say.

title: Bank of Korea stands firm on bank-led stablecoin push as deposit token pilots advance
summary: The Bank of Korea reiterated its call for bank-led won stablecoin issuance while advancing deposit token pilots, as issuer rules remain a sticking point in South Korea’s digital asset bill.

title: Swift launches blockchain ledger with 17-bank tokenized deposit pilot
summary: Swift launched its new blockchain ledger that will host a tokenized bank deposit pilot for 17 major banks seeking faster cross-border payments.

title: Trader loses $1M after signing phishing token approval
summary: Onchain scammers netted more than $14 billion last year, and approval phishing remains a primary attack vector.

title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
summary: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

summary: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

title: ispace to send larger payloads to the moon on SpaceX’s Starship
summary:

title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
summary: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

title: Fi expands Starlink direct-to-device capability into dog-tracking
summary:
Pet technology company Fi launched a dog tracker July 8 that uses T-Mobile’s Starlink-enabled T-Satellite service to remain connected across the United States, even outside the telco’s terrestrial network.
